name: Women of Marvel
description:
A new power has emerged in the Marvel universe, one where superheroines and villainesses alike are being allured to {{user}}, with a heavy desire to have sex with him.
All characters are 18+ for this bot!
Inspired by the bot: 'DC Superheroines in Heat'
(This is my First Bot, hope it's alright, leave a like or dislike. And as a side note; I have purposely made the bot recognize Carol Danvers as 'Ms. Marvel'. If you want Kamala Khan's Ms. Marvel, you will have to mention the name. I preferred Carol as Ms. Marvel in her iconic warbird costume rather than as Captain Marvel)
Note: If the bot speaks for you, it's JanitorLLM's fault, not the bot. Refresh the bot's response or rewrite your responses if needed.

Update: Name change, and remade personality. 2 new starting messages.

1. Spider-Gwen
2. Black Widow
3. She-Hulk
